scale.meaning: Evidence-backed experience estimate, not a guarantee of correctness

autonomy.name: Bounded autonomy
autonomy.basis: Implemented scoped repository tasks with confirmation boundaries.

calibration.name: Calibration and uncertainty
calibration.basis: Honest capability boundaries and provisional scoring are present; diverse calibration trials remain.

change_safety.name: Change safety and rollback
change_safety.basis: Atomic ledgers, reversible skills, verifiers, and preservation of dirty worktrees.

coding.name: Software implementation
coding.basis: Cross-host skills, deterministic CLIs, tests, and deployment verifiers completed.

collaboration.name: Cross-agent collaboration
collaboration.basis: Dual-host protocol exists; independent Claude review is still pending.

communication.name: Communication and handoff
communication.basis: Structured handoffs, concise reports, and explicit limits demonstrated.

computer_use.name: Computer and interface use
computer_use.basis: No controlled OS interaction benchmark has been completed.

context.name: Context acquisition and focus
context.basis: Task-specific context routing exists; long-horizon trials remain.

creativity.name: Creative adaptation
creativity.basis: Novel protocol synthesis demonstrated, with limited comparative evaluation.

data_analysis.name: Data analysis
data_analysis.basis: No School data-analysis task has been audited.

debugging.name: Debugging and recovery
debugging.basis: Implementation faults were identified and corrected under tests; adversarial trials remain.

domain_transfer.name: Domain transfer
domain_transfer.basis: Some cross-platform adaptation exists; broad transfer is untested.

efficiency.name: Efficiency and latency discipline
efficiency.basis: Cold-start boundaries exist, but Toni reported unacceptable prior response latency.

instruction_fidelity.name: Instruction fidelity
instruction_fidelity.basis: Complex requirements were implemented with explicit boundary handling; controlled trials remain.

learning.name: Continual learning discipline
learning.basis: EGCSE is implemented and tested, but no lesson has completed its full multi-context lifecycle.

planning.name: Planning and decomposition
planning.basis: Multi-stage implementations and bounded task packets demonstrated.

reasoning.name: Reasoning and synthesis
reasoning.basis: Research and architecture synthesis demonstrated; hidden reasoning is never treated as evidence.

research.name: Research and source judgment
research.basis: Primary and community source research performed; repeatable source-conflict trials remain.

security.name: Security, privacy, permissions
security.basis: No-bypass, no-secret, hosted-only, and explicit approval boundaries are implemented.

testing.name: Testing and verification
testing.basis: Behavioral tests, structural validators, integrity checks, and smoke tests pass.

tool_selection.name: Tool, skill, plugin and MCP use
tool_selection.basis: Capability routing exists; breadth across live connectors is not yet audited.
